c5d550e4-ee34-466f-aeea-4fbc6dc93d28.description: Send a confirmation email when the user has booked an appointment. Before calling this tool, collect the person's full name,email address, appointment date, and appointment time.

to.description: Recipient email address where the appointment confirmation will be sent

subject.description: Email subject line. Use {{name}} to insert the person's name.

body.description: Email body template. Replace {{name}}, {{appointment_date}}, and {{appointment_time}} with values collected from the user.

name.description: Full name of the person who booked the appointment

appointment_date.description: Date of the appointment (e.g., June 10, 2026 or 2026-06-10)

appointment_time.description: Time of the appointment (e.g., 3:00 PM or 15:00)
